style_spec.art_style: HD-2D classic RPG style (Octopath/Live A Live remake flavor). Solemn, ancient mythology meets psychological manifestation. Strong emphasis on Han dynasty stone carvings, bronze ware motifs, and ancient totems. Zero cuteness/chibi; creatures must evoke a sense of awe, antiquity, and emotional resonance.
style_spec.rendering: Masterpiece pixel art, targeted at 128px base sprite resolution (intelligible at small scale), 16-bit retro-modern color palette, sharp individual pixels without anti-aliasing on the core sprite, blended with modern post-processing rendering techniques.
style_spec.camera_angle: Isometric 3/4 front-facing perspective, placed on a subtle dimensional ground plane.
style_spec.lighting: Dramatic studio lighting, cinematic HD-2D style. 45-degree top-left directional main light, intense volumetric lighting (god rays) piercing through the atmosphere, strong glowing rim light on the creature's edge.
style_spec.shadow_style: Deep, high-contrast ambient occlusion. Harsh, pitch-black drop shadows directly underneath the creature to ground it. Self-shadowing follows rigid pixel art shading clusters.
style_spec.atmospheric_treatment: Shallow depth of field (tilt-shift effect). The creature in the foreground is pixel-perfect and razor-sharp, while the background consists of soft, out-of-focus cinematic bokeh, mystical fog, and faint particle dust.
style_spec.linework: Selective pixel outlining (darker tones of the base colors) on the sprite's outer edges to ensure readability on small mobile screens. No linework on atmospheric effects or background.

metal.lore_keyword: tarnished bronze, sharp grief, metallic sheen, unyielding sorrow

wood.lore_keyword: decaying bark, deep resentment, ancient roots, overgrown moss

water.lore_keyword: abyssal depths, fluid melancholy, pale moonlight on dark waves, freezing despair

fire.lore_keyword: cinnabar ash, raging obsession, glowing embers, sacrificial flames

earth.lore_keyword: ancient loess, heavy apathy, obsidian shards, weathered jade carvings

common.power_aura: Subtle grounding aura, faint elemental dust at the feet.
common.effects: Static pose, clean silhouette, focusing on the core anatomy of the creature.
common.border: No border, stands on a simple ancient stone slab.

rare.power_aura: Swirling elemental energy surrounding the body, distinct volumetric glow from the core.
rare.effects: Dynamic stance, floating ancient Hanzi (Chinese characters) faintly glowing in the background fog.
rare.border: No border, stands on a glowing engraved bronze pedestal.

legendary.power_aura: Massive divine halo, explosive elemental manifestation, blinding rim light and god rays.
legendary.effects: God-like presence, intricate floating ancient seal-script runes, ethereal floating jade/bronze armor fragments, intense cinematic bloom.
legendary.border: No border, hovering over a shattered, levitating mythological altar.

prompt_template: A masterpiece HD-2D pixel art sprite of a Shan Hai Jing mythological beast named '{species_zh}'. LORE: {species_lore}. ELEMENT: {wuxing}. COLOR PALETTE: {wuxing_palette_desc}. RARITY TIER: {rarity}. VISUAL EFFECTS: {rarity_aura}. STYLE: Strict 16-bit classic RPG pixel art character, isometric 3/4 front-facing view. Solemn, ancient, monumental vibe inspired by Han dynasty stone reliefs and ancient bronze totems. RENDERING: Dramatic 45-degree directional lighting, intense volumetric god rays, glowing rim light. Deep, harsh drop shadows underneath. Foreground sprite is sharp with crisp pixel edges, set against a beautifully blurred, out-of-focus atmospheric bokeh background with mystical fog. Designed for 128px readability. --no chibi, cute, modern cartoon, anime, 3d render, vector, blurry edges, firearms, sci-fi, humanoid cosplay
sample_filled_prompt: A masterpiece HD-2D pixel art sprite of a Shan Hai Jing mythological beast named '帝江幼形' (Infant Di Jiang). LORE: A faceless, six-legged, four-winged ancient entity, manifesting from human confusion and primordial chaos. ELEMENT: earth. COLOR PALETTE: ancient loess, heavy apathy, obsidian shards, weathered jade carvings. Primary colors are warm muddy yellow and dark brown with pale jade accents. RARITY TIER: common. VISUAL EFFECTS: Subtle grounding aura, faint elemental dust at the feet, static pose, clean silhouette, standing on a simple ancient stone slab. STYLE: Strict 16-bit classic RPG pixel art character, isometric 3/4 front-facing view. Solemn, ancient, monumental vibe inspired by Han dynasty stone reliefs and ancient bronze totems. RENDERING: Dramatic 45-degree directional lighting, intense volumetric god rays, glowing rim light. Deep, harsh drop shadows underneath. Foreground sprite is sharp with crisp pixel edges, set against a beautifully blurred, out-of-focus atmospheric bokeh background with mystical fog. Designed for 128px readability. --no chibi, cute, modern cartoon, anime, 3d render, vector, blurry edges, firearms, sci-fi, humanoid cosplay
quality_checklist: 1. Readability: Is the creature's silhouette highly distinct and recognizable even if scaled down to a 5-inch mobile screen (around 128px)?
2. Tone/Atmosphere: Does the creature look solemn, ancient, and mythological (passing the 'Bronze/Stone Carving' vibe check), strictly avoiding any cute or chibi proportions?
3. HD-2D Lighting: Does the image feature a strong 45-degree directional light, volumetric rays, and a deep, grounding drop shadow underneath the sprite?
4. Elemental Accuracy: Does the color palette clearly reflect its assigned WuXing (Metal/Wood/Water/Fire/Earth) while maintaining the ancient aesthetic?
5. Pixel Art Fidelity: Is the main subject clearly rendered in a crisp pixel art style (with visible pixel clusters) rather than looking like a smooth digital painting or a messy 3D render?
